vocab.meaning: tận hưởng, đắm mình trong (không khí, ánh nắng)
vocab.example: I love nothing more than sitting on the shore to soak up the sun and the salty sea breeze.

vocab.meaning: chiêm ngưỡng, kinh ngạc trước vẻ đẹp của cái gì
vocab.example: From the peak, you can really marvel at the breathtaking scale of the valley below.

vocab.meaning: nằm ẩn mình, hẻo lánh (nơi chốn)
vocab.example: I prefer the mountains because you can find tiny cabins tucked away in the forest, far from the crowds.

vocab.meaning: tình cờ bắt gặp, khám phá ra
vocab.example: One of the joys of hiking is when you stumble upon a hidden waterfall deep in the woods.
I could spend hours just gazing out at the endless blue horizon of the ocean.

vocab.meaning: đi về phía, chọn hướng đi
vocab.example: During the summer holidays, I usually head for the coast to escape the sweltering heat of the city.

vocab.meaning: làm mát cơ thể, giải nhiệt
vocab.example: There's no better way to cool off than taking a dip in the refreshing turquoise waters of the sea.
I paused for a moment on the cliffside to take in the spectacular scenery of the rugged coastline.

vocab.meaning: cảm thấy hợp, hòa hợp với (không gian, cảm xúc)
vocab.example: I really vibe with the tranquil and majestic energy that only high altitudes can provide.

vocab.meaning: làm cho tỉnh táo, sảng khoái lại
vocab.example: The crisp mountain air always helps to freshen up my mind after a stressful week at work.
